member.name: M:GTA.World.DrawBoxForAngledArea(GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,System.Single,System.Drawing.Color,GTA.DrawBoxFlags)
member.summary: Draws a box that occupies the angled area. An angled area is an X-Z oriented rectangle with three parameters: origin, extent, and width.
member.param: The mid-point along a base edge of the rectangle.
The mid-point of opposite base edge on the other Z.
The length of the base edge.
